Manages app states, user preferences, system themes, and shell transitions in Pebble firmware.

## Folders
- **[normal](normal/README.md)**: Manages app idle timeouts, battery UI, display calibration, language changes, user preferences, quick launch, shell transitions, shutdown behavior, system app registry, app state machine, watchface interactions, and welcome notifications in Pebble firmware.
- **[prf](prf/README.md)**: Functions for compositor animations, Bluetooth events, stubs, JSON config, and system app state machine.
- **[sdk](sdk/README.md)**: Manages user preferences, app transitions, event loops, app states, and watchface interactions in Pebble firmware.

## Files
- **[prefs.h](prefs.h.md)**: Defines and manages shell preferences for clock settings, timezone, units, backlight, and display.
- **[prefs_private.h](prefs_private.h.md)**: Functions for managing preference data in a backing store, including read, write, and event handling.
- **[prefs_syscalls.c](prefs_syscalls.c.md)**: Defines a syscall for retrieving distance units preference in the Pebble firmware.
- **[prefs_syscalls.h](prefs_syscalls.h.md)**: Header file for retrieving distance units preference in the Pebble firmware shell.
- **[shell.h](shell.h.md)**: Functions for obtaining compositor transition animations for watchface and app transitions.
- **[shell_event_loop.h](shell_event_loop.h.md)**: Initializes and handles events for the base firmware UI in the shell event loop.
- **[system_app_state_machine.h](system_app_state_machine.h.md)**: Functions for managing app state transitions, including startup, crash recovery, and app launch registration.
- **[system_theme.c](system_theme.c.md)**: Defines system theme text styles and provides functions to retrieve font keys and sizes for different platforms.
- **[system_theme.h](system_theme.h.md)**: Defines text style fonts and functions for managing system theme font keys and sizes.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Generates system and resource app registries and enums for Pebble firmware based on JSON definitions.
